title: Full-Stack AI Engineer (React, Node, AI)
description:
We are seeking a Full-Stack AI Engineer with strong hands-on
experience in React, Node.js, and AI/ML technologies. The
ideal candidate will design, build, and scale AI-powered web
applications, working across frontend, backend, and AI
integration layers.

Key Responsibilities

Required Skills & Qualifications

- Minimum 5+years of experience in Java (Java 8 or above).
- Hands-on experience with Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring
  Data JPA, and Spring Security.
- Experience in building microservices-based architectures.
- Strong knowledge of RESTful web services and API design.
- Experience with databases: Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL, or
  similar.
- Familiarity with Hibernate/JPA.
- Knowledge of banking and financial domain concepts (e.g.,
  payments, loans, accounts, treasury, risk, compliance,
  etc.).
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines, Git, Maven/Gradle, Jenkins.
- Understanding of security protocols (OAuth2, JWT,
  encryption, etc.).
- Strong problem-solving and debugging skills.

RequirementsTechnical Skills Required

- Strong experience with React.js (hooks, state management,
  performance optimization)
- Solid backend expertise in Node.js (Express/NestJS)
- Hands-on experience with AI/ML integration (LLMs,
  embeddings, vector databases)
- Experience with Python for AI workflows is a plus
- Knowledge of databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis)
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP)
- Familiarity with Docker, CI/CD, and microservices
  architecture

AI & Data Skills

- Experience with LLMs, prompt engineering, RAG pipelines
- Understanding of model inference, fine-tuning, and AI APIs
- Knowledge of vector databases (Pinecone, FAISS, Weaviate,
  etc.)
- Awareness of AI security, ethics, and performance
  optimization

Nice to Have

- Experience building AI-powered SaaS products
- Exposure to MLOps concepts
- Startup or product-driven development experience

What We’re Looking For

- Strong hands-on coder (not just design/architecture)
- Problem-solver with a product mindset
- Comfortable working end-to-end across the stack
responsibilities: Design and build AI-powered web applications across frontend, backend, and AI integration layers
Implement LLM integrations, prompt engineering, and RAG pipelines
Develop and optimize React.js frontend with hooks and state management
Build scalable backend services using Node.js (Express/NestJS)
Integrate vector databases (Pinecone, FAISS, Weaviate) for AI workflows
Work with AI APIs, model inference, and fine-tuning implementations
Ensure AI security, ethics, and performance optimization
Collaborate on microservices architecture and CI/CD pipelines
use_cases: Enterprise web applications with AI integration
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on work with AI/ML technologies
including LLMs, prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, model
fine-tuning, and vector databases. The engineer will design,
build, and scale AI-powered web applications with direct
integration of AI components, not just supporting
infrastructure.
